questionHtml: Using a supply and demand diagram and data from the text, explain how a “disequilibrium in the domestic US tinplate steel market” would occur if there were no imports (paragraph [3]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

For a supply and demand diagram, the vertical axis should be price or p. The horizontal axis should be quantity or q. A title is not necessary.
